mapper.select:
SELECT pr.odd_number oddNumber, pr.recruit_department_id recruitDepartmentId, pr.recruit_job_id recruitJobId, pr.recruit_num recruitNum, pr.recruited_num recruitedNum, ROUND(pr.recruited_num * 100.0 / pr.recruit_num, 2) as completionRate, pr.state FROM boss_person_require pr
pr.state in ('inRecruitment', 'pass', 'endRecruitment')
AND pr.tenant_id = #{tenantId}
AND pr.recruit_department_id = #{departmentId}
AND pr.create_time >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00')
AND pr.create_time < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
ORDER BY pr.create_time DESC

SELECT f.name as channelName, COUNT(i.id) as totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN i.state = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hiredCount, # 面试通过数量 SUM(CASE WHEN i.state = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rejectedCount, # 拒绝入职数量 ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN i.state = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(i.id), 2) as successRate # 成功率 FROM boss_interview i LEFT JOIN boss_interviewee_from f ON i.from_id = f.id
AND i.tenant_id = #{tenantId}
AND i.create_time >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00')
AND i.create_time < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
GROUP BY f.id HAVING COUNT(i.id) > 0

SELECT pr.recruit_department_id recruitDepartmentId, COUNT(pr.id) as requirementCount, # 需求数量 SUM(pr.recruit_num) as totalNeedCount, # 总招聘数量 SUM(pr.recruited_num) as totalRecruitedCount, # 已招聘数量 ROUND(SUM(pr.recruited_num) * 100.0 / SUM(pr.recruit_num), 2) as overallCompletionRate # 整体完成率 FROM boss_person_require pr
pr.state in ('inRecruitment', 'pass', 'endRecruitment')
AND pr.tenant_id = #{tenantId}
AND pr.create_time >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00')
AND pr.create_time < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
GROUP BY pr.recruit_department_id ORDER BY totalNeedCount DESC
